---
title: "The Ven. John Frederick Lloyd"
---

## The Ven. John Frederick Lloyd

**Dates:** (1810-1875)

### Description

Archdeacon of Waitemata

### Biography

He was a fellow of St. John’s College, Auckland (1849-53), vicar of St. Paul’s, Auckland (1853-65), Archdeacon of Waitemata 1865-1870; he returned to England in 1870 and became Rector of Kirk-Ireton, Wirksworth. [DNZB]

### Letters

- Letter from Novr. 20th 1873

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
